hero.headline: Building the Future of Puget Sound — One Infill at a Time
hero.subheadline: From Seattle backyards to ADUs and small multifamily, Patricia Wen helps homeowners and investors unlock hidden value in Northwest real estate.

values.title: Local Expertise
values.body: Deep knowledge of Seattle neighborhoods, zoning codes, and infill development opportunities.

values.title: Investor-Focused
values.body: Data-driven analysis and transparent reporting so your capital works smarter.

values.title: Community First
values.body: We build projects that add density thoughtfully and improve neighborhoods.

values.title: End-to-End Service
values.body: From feasibility through closing—one trusted team handles everything.

values.title: Bilingual Support
values.body: Fluent in English and Mandarin. WeChat: Realtor-Patricia.

about.title: Our Mission
about.body: To create attainable housing and strong returns by unlocking the infill potential of the Puget Sound region.

about.title: How We Work
about.body: We guide you through feasibility, design, permitting, construction, and sale—always with clear communication and no surprises.

about.title: The Team
about.body: Patricia Wen leads a network of architects, builders, and lenders—all specializing in Seattle infill and ADU development.

homeownerCards.title: ADU & DADU
homeownerCards.body: Add a detached or attached accessory dwelling unit to increase rental income and property value.

homeownerCards.title: Lot Split & Infill
homeownerCards.body: Does your lot qualify for a split or townhome project? We'll run the numbers for you—free.

homeownerCards.title: Sell or Develop?
homeownerCards.body: Not sure whether to sell as-is or pursue development? We'll model both options with real data.

services.title: Design + Build
services.body: Full design-build services for ADUs, townhomes, and small multifamily projects throughout the Seattle metro.

services.title: Development Consulting
services.body: Feasibility studies, zoning analysis, pro forma modeling, and permit strategy for your project.

services.title: Construction Management
services.body: Owner's rep and construction management services to keep your project on schedule and on budget.

investorTiles.title: Transparent Reporting
investorTiles.body: Monthly investor updates with real-time project metrics, draw schedules, and exit projections.

investorTiles.title: Risk Management
investorTiles.body: Conservative underwriting, contingency planning, and experienced contractor relationships.

investorTiles.title: Repeat Opportunities
investorTiles.body: Our growing pipeline means priority deal flow for returning capital partners.

footer.blurb: Patricia Wen is a Seattle-based real estate agent and infill developer specializing in ADUs, townhomes, and small multifamily projects across the Puget Sound region.
